title: Lethargy MC
description: A survival multiplayer focused vanilla-compatible modpack for the client and server, including utility mods, quality of life changes, and visual improvements.
body:
Salad is a modpack featuring a curated variety of performance mods, quality of life mods, and advanced tools and utilities.

The goal of this modpack is to create a well optimized, highly configurable, and fully featured collection of mods for the newest versions of minecraft. Designed mainly for SMP use, but includes creative tools and can be easily modified to be fully client-side for use on vanilla servers.

Salad is meant to be and grow into my end-all be-all modpack for vanilla-ish minecraft.

Feature highlight:
- Play with friends no server needed using [E4MC](https://modrinth.com/mod/qANg5Jrr)
- Performance mods including [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ), [Ferritecore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs), [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ), [Enhanced block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/OVuFYfre), & more.
- Support for most Optifine features
- [Schematics](https://modrinth.com/mod/bEpr0Arc "Litematica")
- [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/UMxybHE8)
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/N6n5dqoA) and [Worldedit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/1u6JkXh5) for creative mode building
- Record your gameplay and produce high quality cinematic scenes with [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/4das1Fjq)
- Easy inventory sorting with [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/O7RBXm3n)
- [Auto-swing and Auto-use for easy AFKing farms+more](https://modrinth.com/mod/t5wuYk45 "Tweakeroo")
- [In-game proximity and group voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/9eGKb6K1 "Simple Voice Chat")
- New mobs from [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/POQ2i9zu)
- Visual improvements like [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/5srFLIaK), [shader support](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U "Iris"), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/1IjD5062), [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/3qAYkBMB), [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/PxQSWIcD "Sodium Dynamic Lights"), [NotEnoughAnimations](https://modrinth.com/mod/MPCX6s5C), [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/50dA9Sha) +[extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/YAVTU8mK "Fresh Animations - Extensions") (optional)
- [Tooltips display shulker box contents](https://modrinth.com/mod/2M01OLQq "Shulker Box Tooltip")
- [Better stats](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6PXGAoM "Better Statistics Screen") and [advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/Q2OqKxDG "Better Advancements") screens
- [Armor Poser](https://modrinth.com/mod/PFwYNrHb) for armor stand manipulation
- [Access a container by right-clicking an item frame or sign attached to it](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough+ "Clickthrough+")
- [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/qpPoAL6m) for less tedious villager trading abuse
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/1bokaNcj) & [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym "Xaero's World Map")
- [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) and other vanilla+ resource packs!
- Performance mods and configs from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop/versions)
- Many more!

Special thanks to:

C4sDaBomb for allowing me to include their [Lily Pads Remade 3D](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/lily-pads-remade/ "Lily Pads Remade on Planet Minecraft") resource pack
